examples: Moist snuff, such as Skoal and Copenhagen, is popular among young users. It's often flavored so it tastes better.
The market share gains by Copenhagen and Skoal came in part because of aggressive price discounting by Philip Morris.
Altria's smokeless tobacco subsidiary, U. S. smokeless tobacco co., will test-market a smokeless tobacco stick using the Skoal name, its top-selling brand.
The spit-free Snus product is aimed at people on the coasts who wouldn't ever be caught dipping Copenhagen or Skoal.
Altria improved its situation with the acquisition of smokeless tobacco maker USD in early 2009, bringing USD brands Skoal and Copenhagen under its banner.
